Test Case Title: Verify Login entry point is visible and opens login modal
Preconditions: User is on Patrika homepage, logged out
Expected Result: Modal/page renders with mobile number input

Test Case Title: Verify OTP is triggered for a valid mobile number
Preconditions: User is logged out, login modal is open
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid 10-digit mobile number
2. Click 'Get OTP'
Expected Result: OTP triggered, "OTP sent" confirmation shown, OTP input field appears

Test Case Title: Verify invalid mobile number format is rejected
Preconditions: User is logged out, login modal is open
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid mobile number (wrong length/letters/invalid start digit)
2. Click 'Get OTP'
Expected Result: Inline validation error shown, OTP not triggered

Test Case Title: Verify OTP request is rate-limited on rapid repeat clicks
Preconditions: User is logged out, login modal is open
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid mobile number
2. Click 'Get OTP' repeatedly within cooldown window
